project_note: Simple educational symptom templates for a lightweight chatbot. Not medical advice.

conditions.name: Common Cold
conditions.summary: Sneezing, mild fever, runny nose, blocked nose, and sore throat can suggest a common cold.
common_otc: Paracetamol if usually safe for you

conditions.name: Flu
conditions.summary: Flu may cause fever, body pain, chills, cough, weakness, and sore throat.

conditions.name: COVID-like Illness
conditions.summary: Fever, cough, body pain, sore throat, smell loss, and weakness may fit a viral COVID-like illness.

conditions.name: Sore Throat
conditions.summary: Pain while swallowing, throat irritation, and mild fever may suggest a sore throat or throat infection.
common_otc: Warm tea with honey if appropriate

conditions.name: Sinus Congestion
conditions.summary: Blocked nose, facial pressure, headache, and thick nasal mucus can suggest sinus congestion.

conditions.name: Seasonal Allergy
conditions.summary: Sneezing, itchy nose, watery eyes, and mild cough may suggest seasonal allergy.
common_otc: Common antihistamine if safe for you

conditions.name: Mild Skin Rash
conditions.summary: Itching, mild redness, or small bumps can fit a simple skin rash or irritation.

conditions.name: Acid Reflux / Gas
conditions.summary: Burning chest, sour taste, bloating, and discomfort after food may suggest acidity or reflux.
basic_care: Do not lie down after meals
common_otc: Simple antacid if safe for you
seek_help_now: Pain spreading to arm or jaw

conditions.name: Indigestion
conditions.summary: Fullness, upper stomach discomfort, burping, and nausea after meals can suggest indigestion.

conditions.name: Constipation
conditions.summary: Hard stool, straining, bloating, and fewer bowel movements may suggest constipation.
common_otc: Simple stool softener only if already safe for you
seek_help_now: No stool with swelling and pain

conditions.name: Loose Motion / Mild Gastroenteritis
conditions.summary: Loose stool, stomach cramps, weakness, or vomiting can suggest a stomach infection or food issue.

conditions.name: Food Poisoning
conditions.summary: Sudden vomiting, loose motion, stomach pain, and weakness after suspicious food can suggest food poisoning.
basic_care: Avoid milk and oily meals for a while

conditions.name: Nausea
conditions.summary: Feeling sick in the stomach with urge to vomit can come from indigestion, viral illness, or motion issues.

conditions.name: Vomiting
conditions.summary: Vomiting may happen with stomach infection, food poisoning, migraine, or viral illness.

conditions.name: Stomach Cramps
conditions.summary: Cramping belly pain can happen with gas, indigestion, diarrhea, or mild stomach infection.
common_otc: Simple antacid if gas-related and safe

conditions.name: Simple Headache
conditions.summary: Stress, low sleep, dehydration, and viral illness may cause a common headache.

conditions.name: Migraine-like Headache
conditions.summary: Throbbing headache with nausea, light sensitivity, or one-sided pain can suggest migraine-like symptoms.
basic_care: Rest in a dark quiet room

conditions.name: Eye Strain
conditions.summary: Long screen use can cause headache, dry eyes, blurred focus, and eye discomfort.

conditions.name: Conjunctivitis-like Irritation
conditions.summary: Red eye, watering, itching, or mild sticky discharge may fit conjunctivitis-like irritation.
common_otc: Common antihistamine if allergy-related and safe

conditions.name: Dry Eyes
conditions.summary: Burning, gritty feeling, and mild blurred vision after screen use may suggest dry eyes.
seek_help_now: Red eye with strong light sensitivity

conditions.name: Earache
conditions.summary: Ear pain, fullness, mild fever, or reduced hearing can suggest ear irritation or infection.

conditions.name: Dizziness
conditions.summary: Dizziness may happen due to dehydration, low food intake, viral illness, or inner ear issues.

conditions.name: Dehydration
conditions.summary: Dry mouth, weakness, dark urine, and dizziness can suggest dehydration.

conditions.name: Low Blood Sugar-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Shaking, sweating, hunger, dizziness, and weakness may suggest low blood sugar-like symptoms.
basic_care: Take a quick sugar source if you are known to have low sugar episodes

conditions.name: Anxiety-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Worry, fast heartbeat, chest tightness, sweating, and restlessness can occur with anxiety-like episodes.

conditions.name: Stress-related Poor Sleep
conditions.summary: Difficulty sleeping, racing thoughts, and tiredness can suggest stress-related sleep problems.
common_otc: Warm milk or tea if suitable

conditions.name: Muscle Strain
conditions.summary: Pain after lifting, exercise, or sudden movement may suggest a muscle strain.
common_otc: Simple topical pain gel if usually tolerated

conditions.name: Back Pain
conditions.summary: Back pain after poor posture, lifting, or strain is common and often improves with rest and movement care.

conditions.name: Neck Pain
conditions.summary: Neck stiffness or pain may happen from posture, sleep position, or mild muscle strain.

conditions.name: Knee Pain
conditions.summary: Knee pain can happen from strain, overuse, twist injury, or mild inflammation.

conditions.name: Ankle Sprain-like Injury
conditions.summary: Pain and swelling after twisting the ankle may suggest a sprain-like injury.

conditions.name: General Joint Pain
conditions.summary: Mild joint aches can occur with overuse, viral illness, or simple inflammation.

conditions.name: Mild Fever
conditions.summary: A mild fever can happen with viral infections, throat issues, stomach upset, or body inflammation.

conditions.name: Cough
conditions.summary: A mild cough can happen with cold, flu, throat irritation, allergy, or viral illness.
common_otc: Paracetamol if fever is present and safe

conditions.name: Bronchitis-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Cough with mucus, chest discomfort, and tiredness may suggest bronchitis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Wheezing / Mild Asthma-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Wheezing, chest tightness, and cough may suggest asthma-like or allergic airway symptoms.
basic_care: Use your prescribed inhaler if you already have one

conditions.name: Urinary Burning / UTI-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Burning urination, frequent urination, and lower belly discomfort may suggest urinary irritation or UTI-like symptoms.
common_otc: Simple pain support like paracetamol if safe

conditions.name: Menstrual Cramps
conditions.summary: Lower belly cramps around periods can suggest menstrual pain.

conditions.name: Mild Toothache
conditions.summary: Tooth pain with sensitivity or chewing pain can suggest a dental issue.
basic_care: Avoid very cold or hot foods

conditions.name: Mouth Ulcer
conditions.summary: Small painful ulcers inside the mouth can happen with irritation, stress, or minor nutritional issues.
common_otc: Simple soothing oral gel if usually safe

conditions.name: Motion Sickness
conditions.summary: Nausea, dizziness, and vomiting during travel can suggest motion sickness.

conditions.name: Mild Sunburn
conditions.summary: Red painful skin after too much sun can suggest a mild sunburn.

conditions.name: Heat Exhaustion-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Heavy sweating, weakness, dizziness, headache, and nausea after heat exposure may suggest heat exhaustion-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Mild Burn
conditions.summary: A small superficial burn may cause redness and pain without deep tissue damage.
basic_care: Cool running water on the area

conditions.name: Insect Bite
conditions.summary: A mild insect bite can cause itching, redness, and small swelling.

conditions.name: Ringworm-like Fungal Rash
conditions.summary: A round itchy rash with scaly edges may suggest a fungal skin rash like ringworm.
common_otc: Simple antifungal cream only if you already use such products safely

conditions.name: Acne
conditions.summary: Small pimples, oiliness, and facial bumps can suggest acne.
common_otc: Simple acne face wash if already tolerated

conditions.name: Eczema-like Dry Itchy Skin
conditions.summary: Dry itchy patches can suggest eczema-like skin irritation.
common_otc: Common antihistamine if safe for itching

conditions.name: Simple Bruise
conditions.summary: A bruise after a minor hit can cause blue or purple skin discoloration and tenderness.

conditions.name: Minor Cut / Scrape
conditions.summary: A small cut or scrape can cause mild pain and bleeding.

conditions.name: Tonsillitis-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Severe sore throat, painful swallowing, fever, and swollen neck glands may suggest tonsillitis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Laryngitis-like Voice Strain
conditions.summary: Hoarse voice, throat discomfort, and dry cough may suggest laryngitis-like irritation.

conditions.name: Pneumonia-like Chest Infection
conditions.summary: Fever, productive cough, chest pain, and breathlessness can suggest a chest infection such as pneumonia-like illness.

conditions.name: Bronchial Allergy-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Recurrent cough, wheeze, and chest tightness after triggers can suggest bronchial allergy-like symptoms.
basic_care: Use prescribed inhaler if already advised

conditions.name: Anemia-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Tiredness, pale skin, dizziness, and low stamina may suggest anemia-like symptoms.
common_otc: No exact iron dosing advice here

conditions.name: High Blood Pressure-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Most high blood pressure causes no symptoms, but headache, dizziness, or blurred vision can occur in some people.
common_otc: No BP medicine start advice here

conditions.name: High Blood Sugar-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Excess thirst, frequent urination, tiredness, and weight change may suggest high blood sugar-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Hypothyroid-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Low energy, dry skin, constipation, and cold intolerance may suggest hypothyroid-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Hyperthyroid-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Palpitations, sweating, anxiety, heat intolerance, and weight loss may suggest hyperthyroid-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Gastritis-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Upper stomach burning, nausea, and discomfort after meals can suggest gastritis-like irritation.

conditions.name: Hemorrhoids-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Pain, itching, or small blood streaks during bowel movement can suggest hemorrhoids-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Kidney Stone-like Pain
conditions.summary: Sudden severe side pain radiating to groin with nausea can suggest kidney stone-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Sciatica-like Leg Pain
conditions.summary: Back pain shooting down one leg with tingling can suggest sciatica-like nerve irritation.

conditions.name: Plantar Fasciitis-like Heel Pain
conditions.summary: Heel pain worse with first steps in the morning may suggest plantar fasciitis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Carpal Tunnel-like Wrist Symptoms
conditions.summary: Numbness, tingling, and wrist pain especially at night can suggest carpal tunnel-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Allergic Rhinitis
conditions.summary: Runny nose, sneezing, itchy eyes, and nasal congestion may suggest allergic rhinitis.

conditions.name: Post-Nasal Drip
conditions.summary: Mucus dripping in the throat with cough and throat clearing can suggest post-nasal drip.

conditions.name: Acute Pharyngitis-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Sore throat, fever, and painful swallowing can suggest pharyngitis-like symptoms.
common_otc: Warm tea with honey if suitable

conditions.name: Otitis Externa-like Ear Canal Irritation
conditions.summary: Outer ear pain, itching, and tenderness can suggest otitis externa-like irritation.

conditions.name: Tinnitus-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Ringing or buzzing in the ear can suggest tinnitus-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Cerumen Impaction-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Blocked ear feeling and reduced hearing can suggest earwax buildup.
basic_care: Seek proper ear exam if persistent
Avoid cotton buds deep in ear
common_otc: Simple wax-softening drops if already tolerated

conditions.name: Blepharitis-like Eyelid Irritation
conditions.summary: Itchy, crusty, or irritated eyelids can suggest blepharitis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Stye-like Eyelid Bump
conditions.summary: A tender small bump on eyelid may suggest a stye-like infection.

conditions.name: Upper Back Muscle Pain
conditions.summary: Pain around upper back and shoulder blade can suggest posture-related muscle strain.

conditions.name: Shoulder Strain
conditions.summary: Shoulder pain after overuse or sudden movement may suggest shoulder strain.

conditions.name: Tennis Elbow-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Outer elbow pain with gripping can suggest tennis elbow-like strain.

conditions.name: Wrist Sprain-like Injury
conditions.summary: Pain and swelling after wrist twist or fall may suggest wrist sprain-like injury.

conditions.name: Finger Sprain-like Injury
conditions.summary: Finger pain, swelling, and stiffness after minor trauma can suggest finger sprain-like injury.

conditions.name: Hip Strain-like Pain
conditions.summary: Hip pain after activity or overuse can suggest hip strain-like pain.

conditions.name: Groin Strain-like Pain
conditions.summary: Inner thigh or groin pain after sports can suggest groin strain-like injury.

conditions.name: Shin Splints-like Pain
conditions.summary: Front lower leg pain during running can suggest shin splints-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Plantar Wart-like Lesion
conditions.summary: A rough painful spot on sole may suggest plantar wart-like lesion.
common_otc: Simple wart care products if tolerated

conditions.name: Bunion-like Foot Pain
conditions.summary: Painful bump near big toe joint can suggest bunion-like foot issue.

conditions.name: Gout-like Flare
conditions.summary: Sudden severe joint pain, often in big toe, with redness and swelling may suggest gout-like flare.

conditions.name: Osteoarthritis-like Joint Symptoms
conditions.summary: Chronic joint stiffness and pain worsening with use may suggest osteoarthritis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Rheumatoid-like Joint Symptoms
conditions.summary: Symmetric joint pain, swelling, and morning stiffness can suggest rheumatoid-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Fibromyalgia-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Widespread body pain, fatigue, and sleep issues can suggest fibromyalgia-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Irritable Bowel-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Recurrent abdominal discomfort with constipation or diarrhea can suggest irritable bowel-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Peptic Ulcer-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Burning upper abdominal pain related to meals may suggest peptic ulcer-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Lactose Intolerance-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Bloating, gas, and loose stools after milk products may suggest lactose intolerance-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Gallbladder-like Biliary Pain
conditions.summary: Right upper belly pain after fatty meals with nausea can suggest gallbladder-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Appendicitis-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Pain starting near navel and moving to right lower abdomen with fever or nausea can suggest appendicitis-like symptoms.
common_otc: No specific OTC recommendation before diagnosis

conditions.name: Urinary Frequency without Pain
conditions.summary: Frequent urination without burning can happen with high fluid intake, stress, or blood sugar issues.
basic_care: Check blood sugar if risk exists

conditions.name: Urinary Urgency-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Sudden urge to urinate with small amounts may suggest bladder irritation-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Stress Urinary Leakage-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Urine leakage with cough or laugh may suggest stress urinary leakage-like symptoms.
seek_help_now: Sudden complete loss of bladder control

conditions.name: Vaginal Yeast-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Itching with thick white discharge may suggest vaginal yeast-like symptoms.
common_otc: Simple antifungal vaginal products if already tolerated

conditions.name: Bacterial Vaginosis-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Thin discharge with unusual odor may suggest bacterial vaginosis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Premenstrual Syndrome-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Mood changes, bloating, breast tenderness, and cramps before periods can suggest PMS-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Perimenopause-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Irregular periods, hot flashes, and sleep changes can suggest perimenopause-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Menopause-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Hot flashes, mood changes, and vaginal dryness after menstrual cessation can suggest menopause-like symptoms.
common_otc: Lubricating products for dryness if suitable

conditions.name: Benign Positional Vertigo-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Short episodes of spinning with head movement can suggest benign positional vertigo-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Tension Headache
conditions.summary: Band-like pressure around the head often due to stress or posture can suggest tension headache.

conditions.name: Cluster Headache-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Severe one-sided headache around eye with tearing can suggest cluster headache-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Peripheral Neuropathy-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Burning, numbness, or tingling in feet or hands can suggest peripheral neuropathy-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Vitamin D Deficiency-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Bone discomfort, fatigue, and muscle weakness can suggest vitamin D deficiency-like symptoms.
common_otc: No exact supplement dose guidance here

conditions.name: Vitamin B12 Deficiency-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Fatigue, tingling, and memory or concentration issues can suggest vitamin B12 deficiency-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Obesity-related Fatigue-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Daytime tiredness, low stamina, and body aches can occur with obesity-related strain.

conditions.name: Sleep Apnea-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Loud snoring, daytime sleepiness, and witnessed breathing pauses can suggest sleep apnea-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Mild Depression-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Low mood, poor motivation, and sleep or appetite changes can suggest mild depression-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Generalized Anxiety-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Persistent worry, tension, and restlessness can suggest generalized anxiety-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Panic Attack-like Episode
conditions.summary: Sudden fear with fast heartbeat, sweating, and breathlessness can suggest panic attack-like episode.

conditions.name: Atopic Dermatitis-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Recurring itchy dry skin patches can suggest atopic dermatitis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Seborrheic Dermatitis-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Flaky greasy patches on scalp or face can suggest seborrheic dermatitis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Contact Dermatitis-like Rash
conditions.summary: Localized itchy rash after new soap, cream, or metal contact can suggest contact dermatitis-like rash.

conditions.name: Scabies-like Itching
conditions.summary: Intense night itching with small burrow-like lesions can suggest scabies-like infestation.
basic_care: Avoid close skin contact until treated

conditions.name: Viral Fever (Non-specific)
conditions.summary: General fever, body aches, and tiredness can suggest a non-specific viral fever.

conditions.name: Dengue-like Illness
conditions.summary: High fever, severe body pain, headache, and weakness may suggest dengue-like illness.

conditions.name: Typhoid-like Illness
conditions.summary: Persistent fever, weakness, abdominal discomfort, and poor appetite may suggest typhoid-like illness.

conditions.name: Malaria-like Illness
conditions.summary: Fever with chills, sweating, headache, and weakness may suggest malaria-like illness.

conditions.name: Chickenpox-like Rash
conditions.summary: Itchy fluid-filled rash with fever can suggest chickenpox-like illness.

conditions.name: Measles-like Rash
conditions.summary: Fever, cough, red eyes, and spreading rash can suggest measles-like illness.

conditions.name: Mumps-like Swelling
conditions.summary: Painful swelling near jaw or cheeks with fever can suggest mumps-like illness.

conditions.name: Hand-Foot-Mouth-like Illness
conditions.summary: Mouth sores and rash on hands or feet with fever may suggest hand-foot-mouth-like illness.

conditions.name: Post-viral Fatigue
conditions.summary: Ongoing tiredness after a recent infection can suggest post-viral fatigue.

conditions.name: Chronic Cough-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Cough lasting several weeks can suggest chronic cough-like symptoms from multiple causes.

conditions.name: Acute Bronchospasm-like Episode
conditions.summary: Sudden wheeze, chest tightness, and cough may suggest acute bronchospasm-like symptoms.
basic_care: Use prescribed inhaler if already advised

conditions.name: Oral Thrush-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: White patches in mouth with soreness can suggest oral thrush-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Gingivitis-like Gum Inflammation
conditions.summary: Bleeding gums, redness, and swelling can suggest gingivitis-like gum inflammation.
common_otc: Mild antiseptic mouth rinse if tolerated

conditions.name: Periodontitis-like Gum Disease
conditions.summary: Loose teeth, bad breath, and gum recession may suggest periodontitis-like gum disease.

conditions.name: TMJ-like Jaw Pain
conditions.summary: Jaw pain, clicking, or stiffness can suggest TMJ-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Cervical Spondylosis-like Neck Pain
conditions.summary: Chronic neck pain and stiffness with posture strain may suggest cervical spondylosis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Frozen Shoulder-like Stiffness
conditions.summary: Progressive shoulder stiffness and limited movement can suggest frozen shoulder-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Piriformis-like Buttock Pain
conditions.summary: Deep buttock pain radiating to leg can suggest piriformis-like irritation.

conditions.name: Sacroiliac Joint Pain-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Lower back or buttock pain worsened by standing can suggest sacroiliac joint pain-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Achilles Tendinopathy-like Pain
conditions.summary: Pain at back of ankle especially with activity can suggest Achilles tendinopathy-like pain.

conditions.name: Patellofemoral Pain-like Knee Symptoms
conditions.summary: Pain around kneecap during stairs or squatting can suggest patellofemoral pain-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Restless Legs-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Uncomfortable urge to move legs at rest, especially at night, can suggest restless legs-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Nocturnal Leg Cramps
conditions.summary: Sudden painful calf or foot cramps at night can suggest nocturnal leg cramps.
common_otc: Paracetamol if residual pain and safe

conditions.name: Varicose Vein-like Discomfort
conditions.summary: Visible leg veins with aching or heaviness can suggest varicose vein-like discomfort.

conditions.name: Mild Dependent Leg Swelling
conditions.summary: Mild swelling after long standing or sitting can suggest dependent leg swelling.

conditions.name: Cellulitis-like Skin Infection
conditions.summary: Painful warm spreading redness of skin can suggest cellulitis-like infection.

conditions.name: Urticaria (Hives)-like Rash
conditions.summary: Raised itchy welts that move around can suggest urticaria or hives-like rash.

conditions.name: Psoriasis-like Plaques
conditions.summary: Thick scaly patches on skin can suggest psoriasis-like plaques.
common_otc: Tar or gentle scale-care shampoo if tolerated

conditions.name: Scalp Dandruff-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Flaking scalp with mild itch can suggest dandruff-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Athlete's Foot-like Infection
conditions.summary: Itchy peeling skin between toes can suggest athlete's foot-like fungal infection.
common_otc: Simple antifungal cream if already tolerated

conditions.name: Nail Fungus-like Changes
conditions.summary: Thick, brittle, discolored nails can suggest nail fungus-like changes.
common_otc: Simple topical nail care products if tolerated

conditions.name: Boil-like Skin Abscess
conditions.summary: A painful swollen skin lump with pus can suggest boil-like skin abscess.

conditions.name: Folliculitis-like Rash
conditions.summary: Small red or pus bumps around hair follicles can suggest folliculitis-like rash.

conditions.name: Impetigo-like Skin Lesions
conditions.summary: Honey-colored crusting skin sores can suggest impetigo-like lesions.

conditions.name: Cold Sore-like Lesion
conditions.summary: Small painful lip blisters can suggest cold sore-like lesions.

conditions.name: Dry Mouth (Xerostomia)-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Persistent dry mouth can suggest xerostomia-like symptoms from dehydration or other causes.

conditions.name: Persistent Hiccups-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Hiccups lasting longer than usual can suggest persistent hiccups-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Traveler's Diarrhea-like Illness
conditions.summary: Loose stools and cramps during or after travel can suggest traveler's diarrhea-like illness.

conditions.name: Intestinal Worm-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Abdominal discomfort, itching around anus, and appetite changes can suggest intestinal worm-like symptoms.
common_otc: No exact deworming dose advice here

conditions.name: Anal Fissure-like Pain
conditions.summary: Sharp pain and small bleeding during bowel movements can suggest anal fissure-like pain.

conditions.name: GERD Night Reflux-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Nighttime heartburn, sour taste, and cough can suggest GERD night reflux-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Fatty Liver-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Mild right upper abdominal discomfort and fatigue can suggest fatty liver-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Hepatitis-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Fatigue, nausea, dark urine, and yellowing can suggest hepatitis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Jaundice-like Presentation
conditions.summary: Yellow eyes or skin with dark urine may suggest jaundice-like presentation.

conditions.name: Gallstone-like Indigestion
conditions.summary: Upper abdominal discomfort after fatty meals with nausea can suggest gallstone-like indigestion.

conditions.name: Pancreatitis-like Abdominal Pain
conditions.summary: Severe upper abdominal pain radiating to back with vomiting can suggest pancreatitis-like pain.

conditions.name: Prostatitis-like Urinary Symptoms
conditions.summary: Pelvic discomfort, urinary urgency, and burning can suggest prostatitis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: BPH-like Urinary Symptoms
conditions.summary: Slow urine flow, nighttime urination, and incomplete emptying in older men may suggest BPH-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Erectile Dysfunction-like Concerns
conditions.summary: Difficulty maintaining erection can suggest erectile dysfunction-like concerns.
common_otc: No prescription sexual medicine advice here

conditions.name: PCOS-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Irregular periods, acne, and weight changes may suggest PCOS-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Endometriosis-like Pelvic Pain
conditions.summary: Chronic painful periods and pelvic pain can suggest endometriosis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Ovarian Cyst-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Pelvic discomfort, bloating, or irregular cycles may suggest ovarian cyst-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Uterine Fibroid-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Heavy periods and pelvic pressure can suggest uterine fibroid-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Menorrhagia-like Heavy Periods
conditions.summary: Unusually heavy menstrual bleeding can suggest menorrhagia-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Dysmenorrhea-like Painful Periods
conditions.summary: Cramping lower abdominal pain during periods can suggest dysmenorrhea-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Pelvic Inflammatory Disease-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Lower abdominal pain, fever, and abnormal discharge can suggest pelvic inflammatory disease-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Allergic Conjunctivitis-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Itchy red watery eyes with allergy triggers can suggest allergic conjunctivitis-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Refractive Error-like Eye Strain
conditions.summary: Frequent headaches and blurred vision during reading or screen use can suggest refractive error-like strain.

conditions.name: Sinus Headache-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Facial pressure with headache and nasal congestion can suggest sinus headache-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Heat Cramps-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Painful muscle cramps after heavy sweating can suggest heat cramps-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Heat Rash (Prickly Heat)-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Small itchy red bumps in hot weather can suggest heat rash-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Mild Hypothermia-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Shivering, cold skin, and confusion after cold exposure can suggest mild hypothermia-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Jet Lag-like Sleep Disturbance
conditions.summary: Sleep disruption and fatigue after crossing time zones can suggest jet lag-like symptoms.

conditions.name: Chronic Stress-related Fatigue
conditions.summary: Long-term stress with poor sleep and low energy can suggest stress-related fatigue.

conditions.name: Mild Memory/Concentration Difficulty-like Symptoms
conditions.summary: Forgetfulness and poor focus can occur with stress, sleep loss, or nutritional issues.
